checks: triton == torch reference BIT-FOR-BIT (fp32, bf16, fp16)
GPU triton signs == CPU torch reference signs

notes: Measured (modal run scripts/modal_smoke.py --tier throughput). 'old' is upstream's 2x-randn perturb+restore only; the real runtime also eliminates per-call empty_cache/synchronize and the entire restore pass, so the end-to-end switch saving is larger. Caught+fixed a real bug here: Triton @jit cannot read module-level Python globals (_C1/_C2) -> inlined the murmur3 constants.
